mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARN_PRO ( PROGRESS_ID, LEARN_ID, STUDENT_ID, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, TOTAL_MINUTE, LAST_POSITION, TEMP_DATA, LAST_SAVED_AT, PROGRESS_RATE ) VALUES ( #{progressId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{learnId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{studentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'IN_PROGRESS', SYSDATE, NULL, 0, '0', NULL, SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARN_PRO SET STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS', START_DATE = NVL(START_DATE, SYSDATE), LAST_SAVED_AT = SYSDATE, PROGRESS_RATE = CASE WHEN NVL(PROGRESS_RATE, 0) = 0 THEN 10 ELSE PROGRESS_RATE END WHERE LEARN_ID = #{learnId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND NVL(STATUS, 'IN_PROGRESS') <> 'COMPLETED'
UPDATE LEARN_PRO SET STATUS = 'COMPLETED', END_DATE = SYSDATE, LAST_SAVED_AT = SYSDATE, PROGRESS_RATE = 100 WHERE LEARN_ID = #{learnId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId}

UPDATE LEARN_PRO SET LAST_POSITION = #{currentSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_SAVED_AT = SYSDATE, PROGRESS_RATE = CASE WHEN NVL(STATUS, 'IN_PROGRESS') = 'COMPLETED' THEN 100 ELSE #{progressRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} END, TOTAL_MINUTE = CASE WHEN #{durationSecond, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL OR #{durationSecond, jdbcType=NUMERIC} = 0 THEN TOTAL_MINUTE ELSE FLOOR(#{currentSecond, jdbcType=NUMERIC} / 60) END WHERE LEARN_ID = #{learnId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND NVL(STATUS, 'IN_PROGRESS') <> 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARN_FBD ( LEARN_FBD_ID, PROGRESS_ID, WRITER_ID, DIFFICULT_YN, FEEDBACK_CONTENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{feedbackId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{progressId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{studentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1, #{feedbackContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT LEARN_FBD_ID FROM LEARN_FBD WHERE PROGRESS_ID = #{progressId} AND NVL(DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARN_FBD SET FEEDBACK_CONTENT = #{feedbackContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, DIFFICULT_YN = 1 WHERE LEARN_FBD_ID = #{feedbackId}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(LC.OPEN_STATUS_OVERRIDE, 'AUTO') = 'WAITING' THEN 'WAITING' WHEN NVL(LC.OPEN_STATUS_OVERRIDE, 'AUTO') = 'OPEN' THEN 'OPEN' WHEN NVL(LC.OPEN_STATUS_OVERRIDE, 'AUTO') = 'CLOSED' THEN 'CLOSED' WHEN LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < LC.START_DATE THEN 'WAITING' WHEN LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > LC.END_DATE THEN 'CLOSED' ELSE 'OPEN' END AS OPEN_STATUS FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LC.LEARN_ID = #{learnId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0
